testcase.name: test_get_autonomous_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_autonomous_prospecting.py:70: in test_get_autonomous_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_status_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_autonomous_prospecting.py:259: in test_status_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_loops_require_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: /api/autonomous/loops/discovery should require auth, got 403 assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_autonomous_prospecting.py:273: in test_loops_require_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"{endpoint} should require auth, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: /api/autonomous/loops/discovery should require auth, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_start_stop_require_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: start should require auth assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_autonomous_prospecting.py:280: in test_start_stop_require_auth assert start_response.status_code == 401, "start should require auth" E AssertionError: start should require auth E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
